utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 of these items. Each one is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (2024-10-15 to 2024-10-19), transportation (flight details and cost), accommodation (hotel details and cost), activities (list with names and costs), additional_services (details and cost), and total_budget (total cost and currency). All necessary details are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', transportation via 'Budget Airlines flight', accommodation at 'Adventure Lodge', and activities: 'Hiking Expedition', 'Street Art Tour', and 'Night Photography Tour'. Looking at the ground-truth ratings: Prague, Czech Republic has a rating of 7; Budget Airlines (Economy Class) has a rating of 10; Adventure Lodge has a rating of 8; Hiking Expedition has a rating of 10; Street Art Tour has a rating of 9; and Night Photography Tour has a rating of 10. The package did not include any additional services (marked as 'None'), so no rating applies there.
